name: Chocolate Malted Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 8-serving package chocolate pudding and pie filling, instant
6 ounces ready-to-fill graham cracker crumb crust
3/4 cup malted milk balls (cut into 3 or 4 pieces each)
2 tablespoons bottled chocolate syrup or sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pudding according to package directions, using the 3 cups of milk.
2. Remove from heat and add chocolate; stir until melted. Stir in malted milk powder. Cool mixture for 5 minutes, stirring often.
3. Pour into crumb crust. Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours.
4. Up to 1 hour before serving: Beat cream and sugar with an electric mixer until soft peaks form when beaters are lifted. Spread over chocolate filling. Sprinkle with chopped malted milk balls and drizzle with chocolate syrup. Refrigerate until serving time.
